status: INTERIM (primary-pair seeds 0-1 verified; remaining 10 runs + 2 negative controls running autonomously on the box; final aggregate -> /root/slot2_pdn/result_slot2_pdn.json)
channel: shared package power-delivery network (IR drop); register/L1-only alu_burst drive on sender core -> victim ring-osc timing lock-in (proven Exp 5.10 cross-core power-rail coupling)
claim_cap: cross-core .holo traversal readout (MODE + relational phase) above matched nulls on real silicon. NOT a wall crossing, NOT d-recovery (sender owns the drive phase), NOT a lattice/crypto/quadrature claim.

preflight_gate.verdict: PASS (16-213, far above the ~3 cliff; consistent with the Exp 5.10 isolation SNR 50-86)

harness_fixes: per-slot phase reference (lock in vs each slot start, not global t0) -- immune to the 0.47% TSC-calibration carrier-phase accumulation that decohered late symbols
deadline-bounded capture (absolute wall-clock stop, not fixed sample count) -- fixes a compounding capture/drive slide as the die warms (40x symbol-index magnitude collapse before the fix)
rvp_diagnosis: The ONLY gate variance is real_vs_pseudo_floor, a per-mode centroid/threshold classifier underpowered at trials=48 (~7 test real symbols per mode). The PHYSICALLY MEANINGFUL matched null -- rho energy-concentration -- is perfectly clean and reproducible: real_rho ~0.885 (min 0.79-0.84), pseudo_rho ~0.18 (max <0.74), 0.000 pseudo above the real 5th-percentile threshold in BOTH seeds; pseudo_reject_floor = 1.000 both seeds. seed1's rvp=0.75 comes from 1-2 real mode-0 symbols dipping just below the 5th-percentile threshold (small-n threshold noise), not from any pseudo leaking through.
relational_phase: STANDOUT and reproducible: phase_corr_true ~0.9997 vs phase_corr_null ~ -0.09, phase_delta ~1.09 (gate >0.30) on both seeds. Differential-theta relational structure survives the cross-core PDN traversal.
negative_controls: queued autonomously (slot2ctrl --silent and --scramble-drive on v2s3 seed0); the receiver decode path is identical, so both must collapse to chance (validates the win is the agreed drive, not an artifact). Scored by the on-box final aggregator.

autonomous_completion.sweep: run_sweep.sh -- 12 runs (6 seeds x pairs 2:3, 4:5), trials=48, slot_s=0.5
autonomous_completion.controls: run_controls.sh -- waits for sweep, runs silent + scramble, writes all_done.marker
autonomous_completion.final_aggregate: final_aggregate.sh -- waits for marker, scores all runs + controls, aggregate.py (requires 6/6 on >=2 pairs AND null controls), writes /root/slot2_pdn/result_slot2_pdn.json, cleans /tmp
autonomous_completion.self_restore: each slot2 orchestrate restores the cpufreq P-state on clean exit and on SIGTERM/SIGINT (signal safety net)

honest_verdict_so_far: Cross-core PDN .holo readout is REAL and works on the primary discriminators (MODE readout 100%, rho matched-null clean, wrong reads ACTUAL not declared, relational phase recovered) and reproduces on 2/2 primary-pair seeds for those. The strict centroid real_vs_pseudo_floor gate is marginal at trials=48 (seed0 pass, seed1 0.75). FULL 6/6 x >=2-pair + negative-control verdict pending the autonomous sweep completion; this interim does NOT declare the witness on 2 seeds.
